parameters.query:
-- Upsert de componentes tarifarios en la tabla operators_tariffs.
-- Si la tabla no existe aún, la creamos aquí también.
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS operators_tariffs (
  id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  sic         TEXT,
  operator    TEXT NOT NULL,
  year        INT,
  month       INT,
  G           NUMERIC,
  T           NUMERIC,
  D           NUMERIC,
  Cv          NUMERIC,
  PR          NUMERIC,
  R           NUMERIC,
  CU          NUMERIC,
  source      TEXT,
  synced_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE (operator, year, month)
);

INSERT INTO operators_tariffs (operator, year, month, G, T, D, Cv, PR, R, CU, source, synced_at)
SELECT
  $1,
  EXTRACT(YEAR  FROM NOW())::INT,
  EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW())::INT,
  $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9,
  NOW()
ON CONFLICT (operator, year, month)
DO UPDATE SET
  G=EXCLUDED.G, T=EXCLUDED.T, D=EXCLUDED.D,
  Cv=EXCLUDED.Cv, PR=EXCLUDED.PR, R=EXCLUDED.R,
  CU=EXCLUDED.CU, source=EXCLUDED.source, synced_at=NOW()
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  '__default__',
  $json.components?.__default__?.G ?? null,
  $json.components?.__default__?.T ?? null,
  $json.components?.__default__?.D ?? null,
  $json.components?.__default__?.Cv ?? null,
  $json.components?.__default__?.PR ?? null,
  $json.components?.__default__?.R ?? null,
  $json.components?.__default__?.CU ?? null,
  ($json.source || []).join(', ')
] }}

parameters.jsCode:
const detail = $input.first()?.json?.message || 'Error guardando en Postgres';
return [{ json: { ok: false, reason: 'db_error', detail } }];
